Metadata.title: Wecacha · Son La Coffee
Metadata.description: Premium Son La coffee from Vietnam, slow roasted with the atmosphere of misty northwest mountains and handcrafted culture.
Metadata.keywords: Son La coffee, Vietnamese coffee, northwest Vietnam coffee, specialty coffee, arabica Son La

Home.heroTitle: Among the misty mountains of Son La...
Home.heroCopy: A flavor begins with red soil, morning fog, careful hands and slow roasting beside a warm village fire.
Home.storyTitle: A place that refuses to hurry
Home.storyCopy: Coffee in Son La is more than a crop. It carries village memory, hillside rhythm and the patience of growers through every misty season.
Home.cultureCopy: From the old metal phin on a wooden porch to a small espresso bar, each brew keeps a part of the mountains intact.
Home.productsTitle: The taste of a mountain region
Home.footerCta: Bring a Son La morning home.
Home.statAltCaption: Coffee gardens on misty mountain slopes
Home.statFarmersCaption: Keeping Son La coffee season alive

Story.title: The Son La story in the mist
Story.intro: Where clouds rest on mountain shoulders, coffee cherries ripen slowly to the sound of wind and village stories.
Story.quote: A good cup of coffee does not begin at the brewer. It begins on a cold morning, when a farmer walks into the farm while mist still rests on the leaves.
Story.chapterTwo: Hands that pick only ripe cherries
Story.chapterFour: Slow roasting to keep the mountains close

Shop.title: Son La coffee shop
Shop.intro: Choose the bean, the roast and the way a mountain morning enters your daily ritual.

Explore.title: Explore the northwest through coffee
Explore.intro: A field journal of photography, short reels and a map of the places behind Son La flavor.
Explore.farmDesc: From 1,050m above sea level, where coffee trees absorb the full essence of earth and sky.
Explore.processingDesc: Strict at every step: from 100% hand-picked ripe cherries to natural fermentation.
Explore.cultureArticleDesc: Coffee is not just a drink, it is the rhythm and story of highland communities.
Explore.heroTitle1: A journey from the cloud gardens
Explore.heroCopy1: Discover the origin, roasting philosophy and the people behind every specialty Son La coffee bean.
Explore.heroCopy2: A story of dedication and passion.
Explore.coffeeCultureDesc: Explore the depth of coffee through the lens of history and modern living.
Explore.eventsDesc: Join Wecacha at launch events, workshops and village journeys.
Explore.recipesDesc: Secrets to brew a perfect cup at home, just like the experts.

About.heroTitle: Bringing Specialty Coffee to a New Generation
About.heroCopy: Starting from coffee hillsides wrapped in northwest clouds – where every Son La Arabica bean holds the pure flavor of earth and sky.
About.harmonyTitle: The harmony of nature and creative inspiration
About.harmonyPara1: Among the cloud-draped mountain slopes of northwest Vietnam, where decades-old coffee gardens still quietly reach skyward through morning mist, the lives of ethnic minority communities have long been intertwined with coffee – a gift bestowed by nature.
About.harmonyPara2: Wecacha was born as a new way of telling the specialty coffee story – not only preserving authentic flavor but also bringing it into modern beverages, close to today's generation. We chose Son La Arabica as our foundation, combined with contemporary roasting techniques.
About.harmonyPara3: Every cup sold is a harmony between artisan spirit and creative inspiration. More than a drink, Wecacha is a new way of telling the Vietnamese coffee story – with care in every small detail.
About.visionCopy: Wecacha looks toward a future where the coffee hills of northwest Vietnam continue to flourish, and the lives of ethnic communities are lifted by the very value that coffee brings. By bringing Son La's flavor into modern beverages, we hope that heritage is not just remembered, but lives on.
About.missionTagline: Wecacha was born to preserve, connect and spread.
About.missionBullet1: Preserve the flavor of every coffee bean – authentic, pure and pioneering new combinations.
About.missionBullet2: Connect highland farmers with customers everywhere through every richly fragrant cup.
About.missionBullet3: Spread indigenous culture and the northwest spirit – genuine, simple but full of pride.
About.value1Copy: Wecacha always strives for a better life for ethnic minority communities in the Son La growing region.
About.value2Copy: All partnerships, procurement and sales processes are carried out clearly, honestly and responsibly.
About.value3Copy: We respect people, indigenous culture and nature – the foundation that creates the identity of Son La coffee.
About.value4Copy: Protecting and developing the specialty coffee heritage, so authentic flavor is passed on through generations.
About.ctaTitle: Join Wecacha into the new season
About.ctaCopy: Explore our range of coffee products meticulously selected from the best growing regions in Son La.
About.farmersPara1: Behind every cup of Wecacha coffee is the effort of hundreds of ethnic minority farming households in Son La. They are not just farmers – they are artisans of the mountains.
About.farmersPara2: 100% hand-selective picking of ripe cherries requires extraordinary patience. Walking steep hillsides in cold mist, carefully selecting each ruby-red cherry to ensure the highest natural sugar content.
About.farmersQuote: "The coffee tree cannot speak, but it repays those who tend it with the sweetest ripe fruit."
About.storyConclCopy: From the high gardens of Moc Chau to the roastery in Muong La, the story of Son La now rests entirely in your cup.
